articles.title: Memorial Day celebrations kick off across US, Trump to honor fallen American heroes - Fox News
articles.description: President Donald Trump is expected to deliver remarks at Arlington National Cemetery as the U.S. pays tribute to fallen U.S. service members, with more ceremonies schedule in Washington, D.C., New York and across the country.
articles.content:
New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani honored fallen service members, Gold Star families, veterans and active-duty troops during Memorial Day remarks aboard the Intrepid on Monday.
While Mamdani said A… [+1147 chars]

articles.author: Nick Lichtenberg
articles.title: The pig in the python: Baby Boomers are strangling the economy they built by refusing to move or retire - Fortune
articles.description: From the housing market to the corner office, America is paying the price for a generation that never learned to let go
